4. `discussion` agent: route implementation, file-editing, and code-review tasks away from `discussion` to the appropriate coder/reviewer agent.

5. System-level: add failure taxonomy logging: `validation_failed`, `guard_rejected`, `timeout`, `bad_format`, `wrong_agent`, `low_quality`.
Expected impact: make the 0% success rate diagnosable instead of treating all failures as equivalent.
